title: Support team unprepared for new error class
body: Spec introduces a new error class but doesn't list runbook or training for support team — they'll get tickets they can't triage.

title: V2 work in V1 disguise
body: The 'just while we're in there' reorg of the queue layer is V2 work — should be carved out to keep V1 shippable.

title: Cleanup of deprecated paths unstated
body: Both gaps and scope flagged: spec describes the new path but doesn't say what happens to existing users on the old path — gradual migration? hard cutover? Out of scope?
